chunks.title: realme-T500-Pro-Buds
chunks.text: Realme has launched a new TWS

chunks.title: realme-T500-Pro-Buds
chunks.text: Now you must be wondering what you get in this box?

chunks.title: realme-T500-Pro-Buds
chunks.text: There is one very good thing

chunks.title: realme-T500-Pro-Buds
chunks.text: First of all, you get a user manual

chunks.title: realme-T500-Pro-Buds
chunks.text: Along with that, you get some ear tips

chunks.title: realme-T500-Pro-Buds
chunks.text: If you want to reduce the size according to your ears, you can do that

chunks.title: realme-T500-Pro-Buds
chunks.text: Along with that, you get a lanyard

chunks.title: realme-T500-Pro-Buds
chunks.text: If you go for a run, this will be very useful

chunks.title: realme-T500-Pro-Buds
chunks.text: Along with that, you get a TWS

text: Realme has launched a new TWS 🎵 Now you must be wondering what you get in this box? There is one very good thing First of all, you get a user manual Along with that, you get some ear tips If you want to reduce the size according to your ears, you can do that Along with that, you get a lanyard Which is very useful If you go for a run, this will be very useful Along with that, you get a TWS
